upstream._comment: mode=mock returns a synthetic Anthropic-shaped response so the demo runs fully offline. mode=passthrough forwards to a real Model API using the enterprise key from the env var below — the agent NEVER sees that key (credential isolation).

guardrails._comment: provider=auto uses OpenGuardrails (context-aware detection incl. indirect prompt injection) when OPENGUARDRAILS_API_KEY is set, else the local regex detector so the demo runs offline. input.mode block=reject risky prompts, flag=allow but audit, off=disabled. output.redactSecrets scrubs credential-shaped strings from responses; output.check runs a context-aware output review when the provider supports it.
